scores.correctness_notes: Covers all required fields from the gold standard (name, type, base, platforms via base field, summary, description, containers, resources with oci-image, assumes: k8s-api) plus extensive additional valid fields. Uses modern `base:` syntax rather than deprecated `bases:`. Doesn't cover the old `bases` format but that omission is not a correctness error.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — all fields including uid/gid on containers (Juju 3.5+), charm-user, charm-libs, links, parts with charm-entrypoint/charm-requirements, and additionalProperties in actions are real charmcraft.yaml fields
